总统接见代表团 - zǒngtǒng jiējiàn dàibiǎotuán - The president receives the delegation
领导接见了我们 - lǐngdǎo jiējiàn le wǒmen - The leader received us
要求接见 - yāoqiú jiējiàn - Request an audience

房间很洁净 - fángjiān hěn jiéjìng - The room is very clean
保持环境洁净 - bǎochí huánjìng jiéjìng - Keep the environment clean
水质洁净 - shuǐzhì jiéjìng - Pure/clean water quality

Meaning: shortcut; quick route (often: there are no shortcuts)
Examples:
这是条捷径 - zhè shì tiáo jiéjìng - This is a shortcut
成功没有捷径 - chénggōng méi yǒu jiéjìng - There are no shortcuts to success
走捷径容易出问题 - zǒu jiéjìng róngyì chū wèntí - Taking shortcuts often causes problems

盐会结晶 - yán huì jiéjīng - Salt crystallizes
糖结晶了 - táng jiéjīng le - The sugar has crystallized
劳动结晶 - láodòng jiéjīng - The fruit of one's labor (crystallization of work)

Meaning: to do everything possible; to give one's all (to the very end)
Examples:
我会竭尽全力帮助你 - wǒ huì jiéjìn-quánlì bāngzhù nǐ - I'll do everything I can to help you
他竭尽全力完成任务 - tā jiéjìn-quánlì wánchéng rènwu - He did everything he could to complete the task
竭尽全力也要试试 - jiéjìn-quánlì yě yào shìshi - Even giving everything you've got, you have to try

Meaning: to save; to rescue (from danger or a difficult situation)
Examples:
他们及时解救了被困的人 - tāmen jíshí jiějiù le bèikùn de rén - They rescued the trapped people in time
警方解救了人质 - jǐngfāng jiějiù le rénzhì - The police freed the hostages
想办法解救他脱离困境 - xiǎng bànfǎ jiějiù tā tuōlí kùnjìng - Find a way to help him out of his predicament

Meaning: ending; conclusion (of a story, affair); outcome; final result
Examples:
这部剧的结局很感人 - zhè bù jù de jiéjú hěn gǎnrén - The ending of this series is very moving
事情的结局出乎意料 - shìqing de jiéjú chūhū yìliào - The outcome of the matter was unexpected
不管结局如何，
我都要试一试 - bùguǎn jiéjú rúhé, wǒ dōu yào shì yí shì - Whatever the outcome, I want to give it a try

Meaning: to quench one's thirst; to be thirst-quenching
Examples:
喝点水解渴 - hē diǎn shuǐ jiěkě - Drink some water to quench your thirst
这杯茶很解渴 - zhè bēi chá hěn jiěkě - This tea is very refreshing
吃个西瓜解渴 - chī ge xīguā jiěkě - Eat some watermelon to quench your thirst

Meaning: pretext; excuse (often to get out of something)
Examples:
别拿忙当借口 - bié ná máng dāng jièkǒu - Don't use "I'm busy" as an excuse
他找了个借口不去 - tā zhǎo le ge jièkǒu bú qù - He found an excuse not to go
借口太牵强了 - jièkǒu tài qiānqiǎng le - The excuse is too far-fetched

Meaning: with all one's strength; to strive to the utmost (to do everything possible)
Examples:
他竭力保持冷静 - tā jiélì bǎochí lěngjìng - He strives to stay calm
我们竭力解决问题 - wǒmen jiélì jiějué wèntí - We're doing everything we can to solve the problem
她竭力反对这个决定 - tā jiélì fǎnduì zhège juédìng - She opposes this decision with everything she has

Meaning: relay; to relay; to take the baton
Examples:
我们接力把箱子搬上楼 - wǒmen jiēlì bǎ xiāngzi bān shàng lóu - We carried the boxes upstairs by taking turns
他接力完成后半段工作 - tā jiēlì wánchéng hòubànduàn gōngzuò - He took over to finish the second half of the work
接力赛马上开始 - jiēlìsài mǎshàng kāishǐ - The relay race is about to begin

Meaning: to reveal; to expose; to denounce (hidden facts, scandals)
Examples:
媒体揭露了内幕 - méitǐ jiēlù le nèimù - The media exposed the inside story
他揭露了骗局 - tā jiēlù le piànjú - He exposed the scam
真相终于被揭露 - zhēnxiàng zhōngyú bèi jiēlù - The truth was finally revealed

Meaning: to welcome; to accept; to integrate (a person, opinion, new idea)
Examples:
这个团队很接纳新人 - zhège tuánduì hěn jiēnà xīnrén - This team is very welcoming to newcomers
希望你能接纳我的建议 - xīwàng nǐ néng jiēnà wǒ de jiànyì - I hope you can accept my suggestion
社会需要接纳多样性 - shèhuì xūyào jiēnà duōyàngxìng - Society needs to embrace diversity

Meaning: to dissect; anatomy; in-depth analysis ("dissection" in a figurative sense)
Examples:
医生正在解剖尸体 - yīshēng zhèngzài jiěpōu shītǐ - The doctor is dissecting a body
这门课学解剖 - zhè mén kè xué jiěpōu - This course covers anatomy
我们来解剖一下这个问题 - wǒmen lái jiěpōu yíxià zhège wèntí - Let's analyze this problem in depth

Meaning: solar term (the 24 "periods" of the traditional Chinese calendar)
Examples:
立春是第一个节气 - lìchūn shì dì-yī ge jiéqì - Lìchūn is the first solar term
节气反映季节变化 - jiéqì fǎnyìng jìjié biànhuà - Solar terms reflect seasonal changes
到了这个节气就开始冷了 - dào le zhège jiéqì jiù kāishǐ lěng le - At this time of year, it starts to get cold

两种方法截然不同 - liǎng zhǒng fāngfǎ jiérán bùtóng - The two methods are completely different
他的态度前后截然不同 - tā de tàidu qiánhòu jiérán bùtóng - His attitude has completely changed (before/after)
这两个观点截然不同 - zhè liǎng ge guāndiǎn jiérán bùtóng - These two viewpoints are radically opposed

Meaning: to intervene; to meddle; to get involved (in an affair)
Examples:
他不想介入别人的矛盾 - tā bù xiǎng jièrù biérén de máodùn - He doesn't want to get involved in other people's conflicts
政府介入调查 - zhèngfǔ jièrù diàochá - The government intervened to investigate
别随便介入我们的决定 - bié suíbiàn jièrù wǒmen de juédìng - Don't go meddling in our decisions

Meaning: to dissolve; to disperse (organization, group, crowd)
Examples:
公司决定解散部门 - gōngsī juédìng jiěsàn bùmén - The company decided to dissolve the department
会议结束后大家解散了 - huìyì jiéshù hòu dàjiā jiěsàn le - After the meeting, everyone dispersed
这个团体被迫解散 - zhège tuántǐ bèipò jiěsàn - This group was forced to dissolve

Meaning: to get acquainted with; to meet (and form a connection)
Examples:
我在旅行中结识了很多朋友 - wǒ zài lǚxíng zhōng jiéshí le hěn duō péngyou - While traveling, I got to know many friends
很高兴结识你 - hěn gāoxìng jiéshí nǐ - Glad to meet you
通过他我结识了导师 - tōngguò tā wǒ jiéshí le dǎoshī - Through him, I met my supervisor

Meaning: at that time; when the time comes (formal, often future)
Examples:
届时请准时到场 - jièshí qǐng zhǔnshí dàochǎng - When the time comes, please arrive on time
届时我们再讨论细节 - jièshí wǒmen zài tǎolùn xìjié - At that point, we'll discuss the details
届时会公布结果 - jièshí huì gōngbù jiéguǒ - The results will be announced at that time

Meaning: to reveal; to highlight; to show (often results, data)
Examples:
数据揭示了趋势 - shùjù jiēshì le qūshì - The data revealed a trend
研究揭示原因 - yánjiū jiēshì yuányīn - The study reveals the cause
这张图揭示了差异 - zhè zhāng tú jiēshì le chāyì - This chart shows the difference

Meaning: to take over; to take on; to pick up where someone left off (a project, work)
Examples:
我来接手这个项目 - wǒ lái jiēshǒu zhège xiàngmù - I'll take over this project
他接手后进展很快 - tā jiēshǒu hòu jìnzhǎn hěn kuài - After he took over, things moved fast
事情太复杂，
我接不了手 - shìqing tài fùzá, wǒ jiē bù liǎo shǒu - It's too complicated, I can't take it on

结算付款 - jiésuàn fùkuǎn - payment settlement
结算中心 - jiésuàn zhōngxīn - payment center
在线结算 - zàixiàn jiésuàn - online payment

Meaning: to disintegrate; to break apart; to collapse (organization, state, system); (phys.) to dismantle; to disassemble
Examples:
帝国最终解体了 - dìguó zuìzhōng jiětǐ le - The empire finally disintegrated
这个联盟面临解体 - zhège liánméng miànlín jiětǐ - This alliance is at risk of breaking apart
把机器解体检查 - bǎ jīqì jiětǐ jiǎnchá - Dismantle the machine for inspection

Meaning: to replace; to take over from; to succeed (in a post, from a person)
Examples:
他接替了经理的职位 - tā jiētì le jīnglǐ de zhíwèi - He replaced the manager in the position
由她来接替我 - yóu tā lái jiētì wǒ - She will take over from me
下一位接替者是谁？ - xià yí wèi jiētìzhě shì shéi? - Who is the next successor?

Meaning: staircase; step; (fig.) rung; stage (in a progression)
Examples:
门口有几级阶梯 - ménkǒu yǒu jǐ jí jiētī - There are a few steps at the entrance
教育是改变命运的阶梯 - jiàoyù shì gǎibiàn mìngyùn de jiētī - Education is a springboard to change one's destiny
把失败当作进步的阶梯 - bǎ shībài dāngzuò jìnbù de jiētī - Treat failure as a stepping stone to progress

Meaning: IOU; promissory note (written acknowledgment of a debt)
Examples:
我给他写了张借条 - wǒ gěi tā xiě le zhāng jiètiáo - I wrote him an IOU
借条上要写清楚金额 - jiètiáo shàng yào xiě qīngchu jīn'é - The amount must be clearly stated on the note
没有借条很难证明 - méiyǒu jiètiáo hěn nán zhèngmíng - Without an IOU, it's hard to prove

Meaning: to free oneself; to be released; relief (getting out of a constraint or suffering)
Examples:
他终于从压力中解脱出来 - tā zhōngyú cóng yālì zhōng jiětuō chūlái - He finally freed himself from the pressure
离开那里让我解脱 - líkāi nàlǐ ràng wǒ jiětuō - Leaving there brought me relief
想解脱就得面对问题 - xiǎng jiětuō jiù děi miànduì wèntí - To free yourself, you have to face the problem

Meaning: to bail someone out; to get someone out of an awkward situation; to defuse an embarrassing moment
Examples:
他一句话帮我解围 - tā yí jù huà bāng wǒ jiěwéi - One sentence from him got me out of trouble
快来解围！ - kuài lái jiěwéi! - Come help me out quick!
她及时解围，
气氛好多了 - tā jíshí jiěwéi, qìfēn hǎo duō le - She defused the situation in time, and the atmosphere improved a lot

Meaning: to analyze; to break down and explain; (tech.) parsing; syntactic analysis
Examples:
老师解析了这篇文章 - lǎoshī jiěxī le zhè piān wénzhāng - The teacher analyzed this text
这个软件能解析数据 - zhège ruǎnjiàn néng jiěxī shùjù - This software can parse the data
请你解析一下原因 - qǐng nǐ jiěxī yíxià yuányīn - Can you analyze the cause?

Meaning: limit; boundary; line of demarcation (abstract, conceptual)
Examples:
自由也有界限 - zìyóu yě yǒu jièxiàn - Freedom also has limits
我们要分清界限 - wǒmen yào fēnqīng jièxiàn - We need to clearly distinguish the limits
公私界限很重要 - gōng-sī jièxiàn hěn zhòngyào - The boundary between public and private is important

Meaning: border line; limit; demarcation (often more "concrete, visual" than 界限)
Examples:
地图上画着界线 - dìtú shàng huà zhe jièxiàn - The map shows the border
用红线标出界线 - yòng hóngxiàn biāochū jièxiàn - Mark the boundary with a red line
别越过这条界线 - bié yuèguò zhè tiáo jièxiàn - Don't cross this boundary

Meaning: to reveal; to announce (result, mystery, prize)
Examples:
比赛结果即将揭晓 - bǐsài jiéguǒ jíjiāng jiēxiǎo - The competition result is about to be announced
今天揭晓答案 - jīntiān jiēxiǎo dá'àn - Today the answer is revealed
获奖名单终于揭晓 - huòjiǎng míngdān zhōngyú jiēxiǎo - The list of winners has finally been announced

Meaning: to mind; to take offense; "does it bother you?" (to care about)
Examples:
你介意我坐这儿吗？ - nǐ jièyì wǒ zuò zhèr ma? - Do you mind if I sit here?
我不介意 - wǒ bù jièyì - I don't mind
他很介意别人说他胖 - tā hěn jièyì biérén shuō tā pàng - He really minds when people say he's fat

Meaning: to tighten one's belt; to live very frugally (to save money)
Examples:
为了买房，他们节衣缩食多年 - wèile mǎi fáng, tāmen jiéyī-suōshí duō nián - To buy a home, they tightened their belts for years
日子再难也要节衣缩食 - rìzi zài nán yě yào jiéyī-suōshí - No matter how hard life gets, you have to cut back
她节衣缩食供孩子上学 - tā jiéyī-suōshí gōng háizi shàngxué - She lives frugally to fund her child's education

Meaning: to borrow (for use); to use by borrowing (object, term)
Examples:
我借用一下你的电脑 - wǒ jièyòng yíxià nǐ de diànnǎo - Can I borrow your computer for a moment?
可以借用你的笔吗？ - kěyǐ jièyòng nǐ de bǐ ma? - Can I borrow your pen?
他借用别人的观点来说明问题 - tā jièyòng biérén de guāndiǎn lái shuōmíng wèntí - He draws on other people's ideas to explain the issue

Meaning: to lie between; to be somewhere between (A and B)
Examples:
价格介于50到100欧之间 - jiàgé jièyú wǔshí dào yìbǎi ōu zhījiān - The price is between 50 and 100 euros
他的态度介于支持和反对之间 - tā de tàidu jièyú zhīchí hé fǎnduì zhījiān - His attitude is somewhere between support and opposition
这件事介于巧合与必然 - zhè jiàn shì jièyú qiǎohé yǔ bìrán - This falls somewhere between coincidence and inevitability

Meaning: to terminate a contract; to break an agreement
Examples:
他决定和公司解约 - tā juédìng hé gōngsī jiěyuē - He decided to terminate his contract with the company
提前解约要付违约金 - tíqián jiěyuē yào fù wéiyuējīn - Early termination requires a penalty fee
双方同意解约 - shuāngfāng tóngyì jiěyuē - Both parties agreed to terminate

Meaning: moderation; to moderate; to restrain; to control (desires, emotions)
Examples:
饮食要节制 - yǐnshí yào jiézhì - Moderation is needed in eating
他不懂得节制脾气 - tā bù dǒngde jiézhì píqi - He doesn't know how to control his temper
玩游戏也要节制 - wán yóuxì yě yào jiézhì - Even with games, you need to know when to stop

他是我继父 - tā shì wǒ jìfù - He's my stepfather
我和继父相处得不错 - wǒ hé jìfù xiāngchǔ de búcuò - I get along pretty well with my stepfather
继父对他很关心 - jìfù duì tā hěn guānxīn - His stepfather cares a lot about him

阳光对肌肤有影响 - yángguāng duì jīfū yǒu yǐngxiǎng - Sunlight has an effect on the skin
护肤品保护肌肤 - hùfūpǐn bǎohù jīfū - Skincare products protect the skin
冷风刺痛肌肤 - lěngfēng cìtòng jīfū - Cold wind stings the skin

Meaning: to seek immediate results; to be too eager for quick success (at the expense of the long term)
Examples:
做学问不能急功近利 - zuò xuéwèn bù néng jígōng-jìnlì - In research, you can't be chasing quick results
他做事太急功近利 - tā zuò shì tài jígōng-jìnlì - He does things seeking immediate gains
别急功近利，
先打基础 - bié jígōng-jìnlì, xiān dǎ jīchǔ - Don't be in a rush, build the foundation first

你的籍贯是哪里？ - nǐ de jíguàn shì nǎlǐ? - What is your place of origin?
他籍贯山东 - tā jíguàn Shāndōng - His place of origin is Shandong
表格上要填籍贯 - biǎogé shàng yào tián jíguàn - You need to fill in your place of origin on the form

他在政府机关工作 - tā zài zhèngfǔ jīguān gōngzuò - He works in a government agency
这台机器的机关坏了 - zhè tái jīqì de jīguān huài le - The mechanism of this machine is broken
人体的消化机关很复杂 - réntǐ de xiāohuà jīguān hěn fùzá - The digestive organs of the human body are complex

激光手术 - jīguāng shǒushù - laser surgery
用激光切割 - yòng jīguāng qiēgē - cut with a laser
激光打印机 - jīguāng dǎyìnjī - laser printer

做个记号别忘了 - zuò ge jìhao bié wàng le - Make a mark so you don't forget
他在书上画了记号 - tā zài shū shàng huà le jìhao - He made marks in the book
这个记号是什么意思？ - zhège jìhao shì shénme yìsi? - What does this symbol mean?

Meaning: to aggravate; to intensify; to exacerbate (contradictions, conflicts)
Examples:
矛盾被激化了 - máodùn bèi jīhuà le - The conflict has escalated
他的发言激化了争论 - tā de fāyán jīhuà le zhēnglùn - His speech exacerbated the controversy
别把问题激化 - bié bǎ wèntí jīhuà - Don't escalate the problem

Meaning: gathering; rally; to assemble (often public, political)
Examples:
广场上有集会 - guǎngchǎng shàng yǒu jíhuì - There's a gathering in the square
他们组织了一次集会 - tāmen zǔzhī le yí cì jíhuì - They organized a rally
禁止非法集会 - jìnzhǐ fēifǎ jíhuì - Illegal gatherings are prohibited

Meaning: taboo; something to avoid (out of superstition, politeness); to avoid a topic or word
Examples:
在他面前别提这个，这是他的忌讳 - zài tā miànqián bié tí zhège, zhè shì tā de jìhuì - Don't bring this up in front of him, it's a taboo subject
很多人忌讳数字四 - hěn duō rén jìhuì shùzì sì - Many people avoid the number 4
这个词在这里挺忌讳的 - zhège cí zài zhèlǐ tǐng jìhuì de - This word is quite taboo here

Meaning: to activate; to reactivate; to stimulate (figuratively)
Examples:
先激活账号再登录 - xiān jīhuó zhànghào zài dēnglù - Activate the account first, then log in
这张卡需要激活 - zhè zhāng kǎ xūyào jīhuó - This card needs to be activated
运动能激活身体状态 - yùndòng néng jīhuó shēntǐ zhuàngtài - Exercise "wakes up" the body

Meaning: infrastructure; infrastructure construction (abbrev. of 基础建设)
Examples:
国家加大基建投入 - guójiā jiādà jījiàn tóurù - The state is increasing investment in infrastructure
这座城市基建完善 - zhè zuò chéngshì jījiàn wánshàn - This city has well-developed infrastructure
基建项目开工 - jījiàn xiàngmù kāigōng - Launch of an infrastructure project

Meaning: to quibble; to fixate on details; to make a fuss (over a small advantage or disadvantage)
Examples:
别跟他计较 - bié gēn tā jìjiào - Don't sweat it with him
别计较这点小事 - bié jìjiào zhè diǎn xiǎoshì - Don't nitpick over such a small thing
她很爱计较 - tā hěn ài jìjiào - She tends to keep score / make a fuss

夜里很寂静 - yèlǐ hěn jìjìng - At night, it's very quiet
房间里一片寂静 - fángjiān lǐ yípiàn jìjìng - Complete silence fills the room
寂静的山谷 - jìjìng de shāngǔ - a peaceful and silent valley

她在一个基金会工作 - tā zài yí ge jījīnhuì gōngzuò - She works at a foundation
基金会资助研究项目 - jījīnhuì zīzhù yánjiū xiàngmù - The foundation funds research projects
他们成立了慈善基金会 - tāmen chénglì le císhàn jījīnhuì - They established a charitable foundation

Meaning: sudden; rapid and intense (increase, drop, change)
Examples:
温度急剧下降 - wēndù jíjù xiàjiàng - The temperature dropped sharply
价格急剧上涨 - jiàgé jíjù shàngzhǎng - Prices rose sharply
情况发生急剧变化 - qíngkuàng fāshēng jíjù biànhuà - The situation changed dramatically

Meaning: just do…; that's enough; it suffices to… (formal)
Examples:
按一下按钮即可 - àn yíxià ànniǔ jíkě - Just press the button, that's all
填完表格即可提交 - tián wán biǎogé jíkě tíjiāo - Once the form is filled in, you just need to submit it
三分钟即可完成 - sān fēnzhōng jíkě wánchéng - It can be done in three minutes

Meaning: to avoid certain foods (for health, religion); dietary restrictions
Examples:
医生让他忌口 - yīshēng ràng tā jìkǒu - The doctor told him to avoid certain foods
